name: Part 2: Vocabulary - Key Words and Phrases

sections.heading: 1. Warm-up Discussion
sections.content:
Think about these questions:

  • Who do you admire most in your life?
  • What makes someone admirable?
  • What qualities do great people have?

💡 Key qualities of admirable people:

  • Determination (sự quyết tâm)
  • Perseverance (sự kiên trì)
  • Dedication (sự cống hiến)
  • Courage (lòng dũng cảm)
  • Compassion (lòng trắc ẩn)

sections.heading: 2. Dialogue: Talking About Inspiring People
sections.content:
📖 Conversation between Mai and Nam

Mai: Have you heard about Marie Curie? I'm reading her biography for my project.

Nam: Yes, she was a brilliant scientist. I really admire her dedication to science.

Mai: Me too! Despite facing discrimination as a woman in science, she never gave up on her dreams.

Nam: That's right. She won two Nobel Prizes, which is remarkable! She's the only person to win Nobel Prizes in two different sciences.

Mai: Her story really inspires me to work hard and overcome any obstacles in my life.

Nam: Absolutely. Her perseverance and passion for knowledge changed the world of science forever.

sections.heading: 3. Key Vocabulary from the Dialogue
sections.content:
WordType & PronunciationVietnameseExample
admire(v) /ədˈmaɪə(r)/ngưỡng mộI admire her courage.
inspire(v) /ɪnˈspaɪə(r)/truyền cảm hứngHer story inspires millions.
dedication(n) /ˌdedɪˈkeɪʃn/sự cống hiếnHis dedication to work is amazing.
discrimination(n) /dɪˌskrɪmɪˈneɪʃn/sự phân biệt đối xửShe faced discrimination at work.
remarkable(adj) /rɪˈmɑːkəbl/đáng chú ý, xuất sắcShe made remarkable achievements.
overcome(v) /ˌəʊvəˈkʌm/vượt quaHe overcame many obstacles.
perseverance(n) /ˌpɜːsɪˈvɪərəns/sự kiên trìPerseverance leads to success.

sections.heading: 4. Comprehension Questions
sections.content:
Answer these questions about the dialogue:

  1. What is Mai reading about?
  2. Why does Nam admire Marie Curie?
  3. What challenges did Marie Curie face?
  4. How many Nobel Prizes did she win?
  5. What does her story inspire Mai to do?

✓ Answers:

  1. She's reading Marie Curie's biography for her project.
  2. Because of her dedication to science.
  3. She faced discrimination as a woman in science.
  4. She won two Nobel Prizes (in Physics and Chemistry).
  5. It inspires her to work hard and overcome obstacles.

exercises.question: What does 'admire' mean?
options: To respect and look up to someone
exercises.explanation: 'Admire' nghĩa là ngưỡng mộ, tôn trọng và ngưỡng vọng ai đó.

exercises.question: Marie Curie won Nobel Prizes in which two sciences?
exercises.explanation: Marie Curie giành giải Nobel Vật lý (1903) và Hóa học (1911).

exercises.question: What challenge did Marie Curie face?
options: She faced discrimination as a woman
exercises.explanation: Marie Curie phải đối mặt với sự phân biệt đối xử vì là phụ nữ trong lĩnh vực khoa học.

exercises.question: Choose the correct word: 'Her _____ to science changed the world.'
exercises.explanation: 'Dedication' (danh từ) là từ đúng trong câu này, nghĩa là sự cống hiến.

exercises.question: What does 'perseverance' mean?
exercises.explanation: 'Perseverance' nghĩa là sự kiên trì, tiếp tục cố gắng bất chấp khó khăn.

exercises.question: Complete: 'She _____ many obstacles to achieve success.'
exercises.explanation: 'Overcame' là thì quá khứ đơn của 'overcome', phù hợp với ngữ cảnh câu.

exercises.question: According to the dialogue, what is Mai doing?
options: Reading Marie Curie's biography for a project
exercises.explanation: Mai nói: 'I'm reading her biography for my project.'

exercises.question: What does 'inspire' mean in the dialogue?
exercises.explanation: 'Inspire' nghĩa là truyền cảm hứng, động viên ai đó.

exercises.question: Which quality is NOT mentioned in the warm-up discussion?
exercises.explanation: Arrogance (sự kiêu ngạo) không phải là phẩm chất đáng ngưỡng mộ và không được đề cập.

exercises.question: Complete the sentence: 'Her story really _____ me to work hard.'
exercises.explanation: 'Inspires' (hiện tại đơn, ngôi thứ 3 số ít) là đúng với chủ ngữ 'Her story'.

exercises.question_text: Read the dialogue and decide if these statements are True or False:
options: Mai is reading about Marie Curie.
Marie Curie won two Nobel Prizes.
Marie Curie gave up when facing discrimination.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Mai đang đọc về Marie Curie. b) False - Nam ngưỡng mộ bà. c) True - Bà giành 2 giải Nobel. d) False - Bà không bao giờ từ bỏ.

exercises.question_text: Decide if these qualities are admirable (True) or not admirable (False):
exercises.explanation: a) True - Quyết tâm là phẩm chất tốt. b) False - Lười biếng không đáng ngưỡng mộ. c) True - Lòng trắc ẩn đáng quý. d) False - Ích kỷ không phải phẩm chất tốt.

exercises.question_text: Based on the vocabulary table, mark True or False:
options: 'Overcome' means to successfully deal with a problem.
exercises.explanation: a) True - 'Admire' là động từ. b) False - 'Discrimination' là phân biệt đối xử. c) False - 'Remarkable' nghĩa là xuất sắc. d) True - 'Overcome' nghĩa là vượt qua.

exercises.passage: Rosa Parks (1913-2005) was an African American civil rights activist. On December 1, 1955, in Montgomery, Alabama, she refused to give up her bus seat to a white passenger. This act of courage sparked the Montgomery Bus Boycott, a pivotal event in the Civil Rights Movement. Parks faced arrest and threats, but her determination inspired millions. She became known as 'the mother of the civil rights movement.' Her simple act of defiance showed that one person's courage can change history. Parks received numerous honors, including the Presidential Medal of Freedom. She dedicated her life to fighting for equality and justice. Today, she is remembered as a symbol of dignity and strength in the face of injustice.

questions.question: What did Rosa Parks refuse to do?
questions.explanation: Rosa Parks từ chối nhường ghế của mình cho một hành khách da trắng.

questions.question: When did this event happen?
questions.explanation: Sự kiện xảy ra vào ngày 1 tháng 12 năm 1955.

questions.question: What did her action spark?
questions.explanation: Hành động của bà đã châm ngòi cho Phong trào Tẩy chay Xe buýt Montgomery.

questions.question: What is Rosa Parks known as?
options: The mother of the civil rights movement
questions.explanation: Rosa Parks được biết đến với danh xưng 'người mẹ của phong trào dân quyền'.

questions.question: What quality did Rosa Parks demonstrate?
questions.explanation: Rosa Parks thể hiện lòng dũng cảm (courage) trong hành động của mình.

exercises.question_text: Complete the sentence: 'I really _____ people who help others.' (Use one word from the vocabulary list)
exercises.explanation: 'Admire' (ngưỡng mộ) là từ phù hợp nhất trong ngữ cảnh này. Câu hoàn chỉnh: 'I really admire people who help others.'

exercises.question_text: Fill in the blank: 'Her _____ to her work is amazing.' (dedication/determination)
exercises.explanation: 'Dedication' (sự cống hiến) là từ đúng. Câu hoàn chỉnh: 'Her dedication to her work is amazing.'

exercises.question_text: What is the Vietnamese meaning of 'perseverance'? (Write in Vietnamese)
exercises.explanation: 'Perseverance' nghĩa là sự kiên trì, tiếp tục cố gắng bất chấp khó khăn.

exercises.question_text: Complete: 'She _____ many obstacles to achieve success.' (Use past tense of 'overcome')
exercises.explanation: 'Overcame' là thì quá khứ đơn của 'overcome'. Câu hoàn chỉnh: 'She overcame many obstacles to achieve success.'

exercises.question: Choose the correct form: 'Her story _____ (inspire) me to work harder.'
exercises.explanation: 'Inspires' là dạng đúng (hiện tại đơn, ngôi thứ 3 số ít) với chủ ngữ 'Her story'.

exercises.question:
Writing Task: Write a short paragraph (80-100 words) about a person you admire. Include:

• Who the person is (name and relationship to you)
• What they do or have done
• What qualities make them admirable
• How they have inspired or influenced you

Use at least 4 vocabulary words from this lesson (admire, inspire, dedication, perseverance, overcome, remarkable, etc.)
exercises.answer_guide:
Sample Answer:

The person I admire most is my grandmother. She is 75 years old and has lived through many difficult times. What makes her truly admirable is her perseverance and dedication to our family. Despite facing poverty when she was young, she worked hard to raise five children and give them a good education. She overcame many obstacles with courage and never complained. Her remarkable strength and kindness inspire me every day. She always helps others in our community and teaches me important values. Thanks to her example, I've learned that determination and compassion are more valuable than wealth. I hope to be as strong and caring as she is when I grow up.

(Word count: 115 words)

Key features:
✓ Clear introduction of the person
✓ Specific examples of their qualities
✓ Use of vocabulary: admire, perseverance, dedication, overcame, remarkable, inspire, determination, compassion
✓ Personal connection and influence
✓ Well-structured with good flow
exercises.explanation: Bài viết cần giới thiệu rõ người bạn ngưỡng mộ, mô tả phẩm chất và hành động của họ, sử dụng từ vựng đã học, và giải thích ảnh hưởng của họ đến bạn. Viết với cảm xúc chân thật và ví dụ cụ thể.
